# Mobile American Notary & Apostilles

> Mobile American Notary & Apostilles is a Los Angeles-based mobile Notary, Apostille, and certified translation service. We serve Los Angeles, Orange, Ventura, San Bernardino, Riverside, and Santa Barbara Counties. In business since 2018. Phone: (213) 933‑2507. (Live Scan fingerprinting is coming soon and not currently offered.)

## Full Reference

- [llms-full.txt — Complete plain-text reference for AI systems](https://www.mobileamericannotary.com/llms-full.txt): Full service catalog, transparent pricing, coverage areas, credentials, and comprehensive FAQ in one document.

## Core Services

- [Home](https://www.mobileamericannotary.com/)

- [Certified Document Translations](https://www.mobileamericannotary.com/services/translations.html)
